hypothesis: Scoring single-pass model outputs without audited benchmark bridges isolates the measurable lift from post-hoc deterministic normalization versus prompt policy alone (L1 raw interleaving baseline).
metric_caveats: L1 raw arm: repair_policy raw_no_benchmark_bridges; canonicalization only, no benchmark_bridge flags.
Compare to H1 post-bridge arm exect_s1_interleaving_h1_post_bridge_gpt4_1_mini on the same predictions pipeline.
Frozen production anchor exect_s0_s1_validation_full_gpt4_1_mini (repair_policy none) still applies inline bridges and is not this arm.
Benchmark-facing fields: diagnosis, seizure_type, annotated_medication only (exect_s1 scope).
